heroTitle: Admin shell for content operations and AI workflows
heroDescription: This round only upgrades the admin information architecture and visual shell, without changing backend APIs or moving business logic into Next Route Handlers.
goalValue: Establish overview, resume editor, AI workbench and publish/export workspaces.
boundaryValue: Keep frontend token validation and do not migrate to cookie/middleware auth in this round.
workflowOne: Business logic remains in apps/server; admin focuses on session shell and operation entry points.
workflowTwo: Production demo accounts: admin (password hidden, please fork for full experience) and viewer/viewer123456.
workflowThree: After successful login users enter /dashboard. viewer stays read-only, admin can edit and publish.
